Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Quiet. We need to get started.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}It's better for us if the lights are off. They cut the power at night anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I don't really like sneaking around...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}First, we have to find the key to the gym. It should be in either the faculty office or the janitor's room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}You three check the faculty office. Akihiko and I will take the janitor's room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}After that, we'll meet in the main hallway on the first floor. Understood?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}So we're searchin' the faculty office, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Hey, maybe we'll find some test questions! Heheh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Maybe I should go to the faculty office, too. It sounds interesting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}You're not planning to do something unethical under my supervision, are you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}H-Hey, c'mon! Obviously I was joking! Haha, hahaha...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}All I meant by "interesting" was that there's a higher chance of finding the key there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Enough with the excuses. Let's head to the janitor's room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}All right, let's get this over with.[n]{f 1 1}
